name: seqFileGetLine
title: seqFileGetLine
syntax: long seqFileGetLine(char buffer[], dword bufferSize, long file);
description: The function reads at most bufferSize-1 characters from the file with the handle file into the array buffer. No additional characters are read after a newline character or after end-of-file.
The function retains the newline character, but the line is not zero-terminated.
return: Return value is the number of characters successfully read, or a negative error code, if the operation fails.
